_comment: IR-1 Phase 1 closure record. The work agent (general-purpose, task a8c1d8801f1c374ee) completed the measure definition + the full Claude<->codex consensus loop and committed it (branch tip d1b8ac7, 9 commits, 8 codex rounds), but its in-process state was LOST when the parent Claude Code process exited before it wrote this output.json / merged. This output.json is therefore ORCHESTRATOR-AUTHORED at closure from the branch's own committed deliverables + consult log; no design content was added or altered by the orchestrator.
phase: IR-1 Phase 1 (define the agentic IR/evidence-recall MEASURE + Claude<->codex consensus)
consensus: Claude<->codex CONVERGED over 8 codex rounds; every finding accepted and resolved; no definitional reversal required.
consensus_oneliner: Primary measure = Evidence Recall@K (strict all-of + graded diagnostic, single required-only denominator); evidence-unit (atomic-fact) relevance with whole-doc as the degenerate case that reduces to eu8 doc-id recall; K-ladder @10/@20/@50 (@10 headline, eval convention); per-class structure (commitment/action/exact-fact/preference/exploratory/negative); modes FTS/vector/RRF/+reranker(stub)/+graph(0.8.1); seed-then-pool qrels on a pinned versioned snapshot; explicitly COMPLEMENTARY to eu7 fidelity, never a replacement.
merged_to_main_by: orchestrator (gate-and-merge at closure; work agent was lost before self-merge)
next_step_for_orchestrator: This signed measure is the input to IR-1 Phase 2 (mint AC-077, gated on Slice-40 merge) and IR-1 Phases 3-4 (gold set + experiments, gated on B-1 corpus-basis ruling + corpus freeze), then IR-2. None block GA. Note: the measure doc independently restates the eu7 fidelity definition (ANN-quant vs exact-f32 vector top-10), which corroborates the GA-1 finding that 0.8.0's hybrid-RRF search() is mismatched to eu7's vector-only ground truth (see the reframed B-1).
